name: Creepy Claus
short_description: Its your first day on the job but Santa isn't impressed Wrap the presents to escape OR ELSE!
detailed_description:
It’s your first day on the job in Santa’s workshop, but it’s already off to a bad start. Santa isn’t impressed with your work, and now he’s chasing you down. The only way out? WRAP THE PRESENTS the job is simple :)

if you are captured by Santa then you are fired, but survive the night and its raining $$$$$

Race through the workshop, gather toys and wrapping paper to wrap each one as fast as possible all while keeping your distance with Santa. But watch your stamina, every sprint drains your energy, and Santa’s always chasing you NO MATTER WHAT. Can you finish the job and escape before he catches you?

be prepared and good luck YOU WILL NEED IT
